opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I am literally tearing my skin off. I haven't slept in two days, and the creases of my elbows and behind my knees are raw, weeping and burning. The itch is unbearable and nothing is helping.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It has flared massively over the last three days and I can't cope with the itching or the lack of sleep — I need something stronger because the hydrocortisone from the chemist has done nothing.

symptom_narrative.onset: gradual worsening over the past 72 hours after the weather turned cold and dry, and on the back of a head cold last week
symptom_narrative.duration: 3 days of severe flare on top of skin that is always a bit dry
symptom_narrative.character: intense all-over itch with red, scaly, weeping patches in the skin creases; some areas are cracked and oozing clear fluid from being scratched so much
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst flare I've ever had — I've scratched myself raw and haven't slept in 48 hours
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: mainly the inside of my elbows, behind my knees, my neck and my wrists
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, much worse at night when the itch keeps me awake
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: cool air helps a little; the over-the-counter hydrocortisone has not helped at all
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: the dry heated air in the flat, hot showers, and scratching

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: lifelong eczema and very dry skin

family_history_as_reported.narrative: family history of eczema, asthma and hay fever

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with partner who is present on the call; central heating is running high in the flat and the air is very dry

objective_data_offered.value: red, ill-defined scaly patches concentrated in the elbow and knee creases, neck and wrists, with scattered scratch marks and small areas weeping clear fluid; thickened leathery skin on the wrists
the itch is a 10 out of 10 and I have not slept for two nights
temperature 37.1 on our home thermometer — no fever
no yellow crusts or golden scabs, no hot spreading redness, no painful blistery clustered sores, and I don't feel feverish or unwell in myself
partner says she looks exhausted and agitated and is constantly rubbing and scratching her arms and the backs of her knees
the flat is warm and dry with the heating turned up high
